schema.reward_lore_id: ID inserted into lore_library when quest is completed (quest_lore_{level})

quests.name: The Forgotten Compiler
quests.description: Complete 5 tasks to align the compiler parameters and purge syntax anomalies.
quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Compiler Wizards.

quests.name: The Broken Daemon
quests.description: Dedicate 60 minutes of deep focus to debug and stabilize the rogue background daemon.
quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Background Daemons.

quests.name: The Library of Infinite Scripts
quests.description: Water your Zen Tree 3 times to grow script-bearing leaves containing ancient functions.
quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Leaf Scripts.

quests.name: The Stack Overflow Sigil
quests.description: Complete a project to craft the ultimate code architecture of the Keep.
quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Architecture Sigils.

quests.name: The Simulation Core
quests.description: Maintain a 7-day streak to boot up the final cosmic simulation engine.
quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the ultimate lore of the Simulation Core.

quests.name: The Mountain of Unfinished Things
quests.description: Complete 5 tasks to clear the pass of procrastination monsters.
quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Mountain Pass.

quests.name: The Keeper of Deadlines
quests.description: Dedicate 60 minutes of deep focus to reinforce the fortress deadlines.
quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Deadline Keep.

quests.name: The Final Checklist
quests.description: Water your Zen Tree 3 times to bless the roots of completion.
quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Checklist Tree.

quests.name: The Shield of Discipline
quests.description: Complete a project to forge the legendary shield of absolute momentum.
quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Shield of Discipline.

quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Eternal Citadel.

quests.name: The Silent Archive
quests.description: Complete 5 tasks to index the scrolls in the quiet archive.
quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Silent Archive.

quests.lore_reward: Unlocks the lore of the Reflection Crystal.
